2026-04-06T20:02:46.5860091Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-06T20:02:46.5860518Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T20:02:46.5860891Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T20:02:46.5861205Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T20:02:46.5861442Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T20:02:46.5861609Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-06T20:02:46.5862210Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-06T20:02:46.5862650Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-06T20:03:47.5268527Z - 🔍 rpc **safeoutputs**←`resp`
2026-04-06T20:03:47.5268901Z   
2026-04-06T20:03:47.5269163Z   ```json
2026-04-06T20:03:47.5269662Z   {"id":1,"result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"result\":\"success\"}","type":"text"}]}}
